top_signals.title: Russia’s gasoline crunch spreads after refinery attacks
top_signals.summary: On an almost daily basis, regional governors in Russia are being forced to limit sales of fuel at filling stations and to try to deter panic buying.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Korean Stocks Rebound After 10% Rout as Focus Back on Earnings
top_signals.summary: South Korean stocks rebounded from a 10% rout, with investors refocusing on chipmakers’ earnings after what many saw as a selloff driven by technicals.

top_signals.title: Vessel Maintenance Demands Rise, IMCA Urges Focus on Diver Safety

top_signals.title: BRIX Marine Delivers Custom Offshore Passenger Catamaran for FunToSee Island
top_signals.summary: BRIX Marine delivers It's About Time, a custom-built 4818-HTC Offshore passenger catamaran from the company's PaxCat lineup, built for FunToSee Island Ferry of Castries, St. Lucia. This marks the second vessel BRIX Marine has built for FunToSee Island…
